subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord and my Hope! These are trees planted in the garden of Thy love, growing by the streams of Thy bounteous grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و ربی و رجائی ان هولاء اشجار فی حدیقه محبتک مغروسه فی شاطی انهار موهبتک
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
